Local Builder

Generate a polished $750 audit report from your research.

Fill in the findings manually, upload proof screenshots, review the live report, then export a clean PDF. Built for written delivery. No slide deck. No design tool needed.

Export uses the browser print-to-PDF flow so it stays stable locally. Click Export PDF, then Save as PDF in the print dialog.

Built on Tenth
Revenue Leak Audit

Apex Heating & Air Revenue Leak Audit

Trade
HVAC
Market
Atlanta, Georgia
Annual Revenue
$2.3M
Audit Date
March 20, 2026
Performance Snapshot
Google Profile
6/10
Website
5/10
Phone Process
4/10
Competitive Position
5/10
Executive Summary

$247,000 in annual leakage identified

The biggest leaks are missed calls, stalled review velocity, weak above-the-fold phone placement, and no estimate follow-up system. None of these require more ad spend. They require better measurement and tighter office systems.

Revenue Impact
$247,000
Across the four highest-confidence gaps identified in public and manual review.
Market Comparison
Northside Comfort
11 reviews in 30 days · stronger map pack visibility
Comfort First Heating
Phone number above fold · faster mobile experience
Premier Air Experts
LSAs active · stronger trust stack on homepage
Missed calls
$121,000
Review velocity gap
$64,000
Estimate follow-up
$42,000
Mobile conversion friction
$20,000
Action Plan
1
Put answer rate on a daily dashboard and assign ownership when it drops below 88%.
2
Launch a job-close review ask process that targets 8 new Google reviews per month.
3
Move the primary phone CTA above the fold on mobile and tighten the hero trust stack.
4
Build a 3-touch estimate follow-up sequence owned by the front desk, not estimators.
5
Reallocate budget only after phone and review systems are fixed so more spend is not wasted.
Proof
Delivery Note
What this is What to do next
This audit shows the highest-confidence revenue leaks visible from public research plus manual review. It is built to help you prioritize what to fix first, second, and third. Review the 5 action items, assign an owner to each, and move the first two fixes in the next 14 days. The biggest wins are usually office systems, not more spend.
Prepared by Built on Tenth. Revenue intelligence for HVAC, roofing, and plumbing companies. Every finding documented so it can be shared with the team and acted on at your pace.
Monthly spend: $11,400
Built on Tenth

Revenue intelligence for home service companies. We study how the most profitable HVAC, roofing, and plumbing businesses grow. We share everything we find.
